Package index

All functions

fp_example()
Get path to fpod example
fp_find_buzzes()
Finds harbor porpoise feeding buzzes
fp_read()
Read FPOD data
fp_summarize()
Calculates minute-resolution summaries of clicks
read_fpod()
Read FPOD data
